zh.lifeSummary: 當James Flegg於1440年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可德雷哈姆時，他的父親William Flegg40歲，母親Margaret Elizabeth Hayfield36歲。他於1465年與Margaret Flegg在英國諾福爾可布拉登哈姆結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1527年在英國諾福爾可布拉登哈姆享年87歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当James Flegg于1440年出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可德雷哈姆时，他的父亲William Flegg40岁，母亲Margaret Elizabeth Hayfield36岁。他于1465年与Margaret Flegg在英国諾福爾可布拉登哈姆结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1527年在英国諾福爾可布拉登哈姆享年87岁。

nameMeanings.name: Flegg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: James
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name borne in the New Testament by two of Christ's disciples, James son of Zebedee and James son of Alphaeus. This form comes from Late Latin Iacomus, a variant of Iacobus, Latin form of Greek Iakobos. This is the same name as Old Testament Jacob (Hebrew Yaakov), but for many centuries now they have been thought of in the English-speaking world as two distinct names. In Britain, James is a royal name that from the beginning of the 15th century onwards was associated particularly with the Scottish house of Stewart: James I of Scotland ( 1394–1437 ; ruled 1424–37 ) was a patron of the arts and a noted poet, as well as an energetic ruler. King James VI of Scotland ( 1566–1625 ; reigned 1567–1625 ) succeeded to the throne of England in 1603 . His grandson, James II of England ( 1633–1701 ; reigned 1685–8 ) was a Roman Catholic, deposed in 1688 in favour of his Protestant daughter Mary and her husband William of Orange. From then on he, his son (also called James), and his grandson Charles (‘Bonnie Prince Charlie’) made various unsuccessful attempts to recover the English throne. Their supporters were known as Jacobites (from Latin Iacobus), and the name James became for a while particularly associated with Roman Catholicism on the one hand, and Highland opposition to the English government on the other. Nevertheless, it has since become one of the most perennially popular boys' names.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When James Flegg was born in 1440, in Dereham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Flegg, was 40 and his mother, Margaret Elizabeth Hayfield, was 36. He married Margaret Flegg in 1465, in Bradenham, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1527, in Bradenham, Norfolk, England, at the age of 87.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque James Flegg est né en 1440, à Dereham, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Flegg, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Margaret Elizabeth Hayfield, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Flegg en 1465, à Bradenham, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1527, à Bradenham, Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 87 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als James Flegg 1440 in Dereham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Flegg 40 und seine Mutter Margaret Elizabeth Hayfield 36. Er hat 1465 in Bradenham, Norfolk, England Margaret Flegg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb 1527 im Alter von 87 Jahren in Bradenham, Norfolk, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando James Flegg è nato il nel 1440 nel Dereham, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William Flegg, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Elizabeth Hayfield, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Flegg nel 1465, nel Bradenham, Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1527, nel Bradenham, Norfolk, England, all'età di 87 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: James Fleggが1440年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクデレハムで生まれた時，父William Fleggは40歳，母Margaret Elizabeth Hayfieldは36歳であった。1465年にイギリスノーフォルクブラデンハムでMargaret Fleggと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1527年にイギリスノーフォルクブラデンハムで87歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: James Flegg(이)가 1440년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 더함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Flegg(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Elizabeth Hayfield(은)는 36세였다. 그는 1465년 영국 노르폴크 브라데함에서 Margaret Flegg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1527년 영국 노르폴크 브라데함에서 87세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando James Flegg nasceu em 1440, em Dereham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Flegg, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Elizabeth Hayfield, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Flegg em 1465, em Bradenham, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1527, em Bradenham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 87 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда James Flegg родился в 1440 г. в местности дирэам, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Flegg было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Elizabeth Hayfield, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Flegg в 1465 г. в местности браденам, норфолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1527 г. в местности браденам, норфолк, Англия в возрасте 87 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando James Flegg nació en 1440, en Dereham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William Flegg, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Margaret Elizabeth Hayfield, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Margaret Flegg en 1465, en Bradenham, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1527, en Bradenham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 87 años.
